title: Eliminate Deep Copying (Critical Performance)

tasks.description: Replace deep copy with read-only reference in GraphStorage.loadGraph() - Return this.cache directly instead of mapping entities/relations, add getGraphForMutation() method for write operations
acceptanceCriteria: New getGraphForMutation() method does shallow array copy only
Add benchmark test confirming O(1) read performance

tasks.description: Update EntityManager to use read-only access - Change all read operations to use loadGraph() directly, mutation operations to use getGraphForMutation()
acceptanceCriteria: No external mutation of returned entities in tests

tasks.description: Update RelationManager to use read-only access - Same pattern as EntityManager for getRelation(), getRelationsForEntity(), createRelations(), deleteRelations()
Update all search classes to use read-only access - Remove defensive copying in BasicSearch, RankedSearch, BooleanSearch, FuzzySearch
acceptanceCriteria: All search classes use loadGraph() directly
No redundant copying in search chain

tasks.description: Add performance benchmark tests for read operations - Create new test file validating O(1) read complexity and memory stability
testCases: should read graph in O(1) time regardless of size (100, 1000, 5000 entities)
should not allocate memory on repeated reads (1000 reads)
should handle concurrent reads without copying (100 concurrent reads)

successCriteria: Read operations return cached reference without copying
Mutation operations use shallow array copy
No memory growth on repeated reads
notes: This is the highest priority sprint. The deep copying issue causes O(n) overhead on every read operation. After this sprint, read operations should be O(1). This sprint must be completed before Sprints 2 and 3.
